items.title: ArXiv, the repository of preprint academic research, says it will ban authors for a year if their papers have "incontrovertible evidence" of AI-generated work (Samantha Cole/404 Media)

items.title_zh: 预印本学术研究存储库 ArXiv 表示，如果作者的论文有人工智能生成的“无可争议的证据”，它将禁止作者一年（Samantha Cole/404 Media）
